chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-1546 of 2022 & C.P.No.D-935 of 2022 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- C.P.No.D-1546/2022 1.For order on office objection. 2.For hearing of CMA No.6974/2022 3.For hearing of main case. C.P.No.D-935/2022 1.For hearing of Misc.No.4262/2022 2.For hearing of main case. 10.03.2025 Mr.Muhammad Aizaz Ahmed, Advocate for the Petitioners in C.P.No.D- 1546/2022 Mr.Abdullah Azam, Naqvi, Advocate for the Petitioners in C.P.No.D-935/2022 Mr.Kashif Nazeer, Assistant Attorney General. Mr.Azad Hussain, Advocate holding brief for Mr.Khalid Rajpar, Advocate for Respondent (F.B.R) It is stated on behalf of learned counsel for the petitioners that a restraint from arrest has been granted in these petitions against surety as an interim measure. They state that these petitions may be converted into protective bail applications and then the same may be granted subject to surety already submitted. In view hereof, these petitions are duly converted into protective bail applications and the applicants are admitted to protective bail from the date hereof till end of Court hours on 17.03.2025 or upon surrender of the applicants before the trial Court, whichever is earlier, subject to solvent surety already submitted to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court. These protective bail applications are disposed of accordingly. Let copy of this order be placed in connected matter.
These protective bail applications are disposed of accordingly. Let copy of this order be placed in connected matter. Judge Judge nasir
